hero.title: Find the right table for tonight
hero.sub: Discover standout restaurants, compare the vibe, and reserve in a few smooth clicks.
hero.panel_heading: Everything guests need before they book
hero.panel_sub: Browse beautiful restaurant pages, compare details quickly, and move from discovery to reservation without friction.
hero.feature1_desc: Find places by city, cuisine, and atmosphere without the clutter.
hero.feature2_desc: See the place faster with clear visuals and cleaner information.
hero.feature3_desc: Pick a date, time, and group size in a simple, premium flow.

highlights.card1_desc: Use cuisine and city filters to narrow the field quickly and spend less time scrolling.
highlights.card2_title: Get a stronger feel before you reserve
highlights.card2_desc: Photos, address, cuisine, and ratings are presented in a cleaner way so your choice feels easier.
highlights.card3_title: Book smoothly on desktop or mobile
highlights.card3_desc: The experience is built to stay clean, readable, and fast wherever guests open it.

featured.title: Featured Restaurants
featured.desc: Start with restaurants that already stand out on SpotBook.

benefits.title: A cleaner journey from craving to reservation
benefits.text: Every part of the homepage is tuned for diners: discover faster, compare more easily, and get to the booking step with less noise.
benefits.card1_desc: Search by city, cuisine, or mood and find a better fit faster.
benefits.card2_desc: Photos and information are easier to scan before you decide.
benefits.card3_desc: A smoother flow helps guests move from interest to confirmed table.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.desc: A clean path from discovering the place to actually booking it.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Search by name, city, or cuisine type to find the perfect spot.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Choose the date, time, and number of guests for your visit.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Receive instant confirmation and enjoy your dining experience.

owner_teaser.title: Want to grow your restaurant?
owner_teaser.desc: SpotBook is building a premium experience for restaurants too. See the dedicated page for reservation management, floor maps, staff tools, and a stronger guest journey.
